title: Bingham Farms Chicken Glazed Rawhide Roll Dog Treat – Dental Chew, Nutritious, Natural Flavour, High Protein – Medium - 5 pk - 90 g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
great for strong chewers: a tasty treat which lasts filled with vitamins, minerals and goodness giving the treats a great taste that your dog will love
natural flavour: no artificial colours or flavours
premium: vitamins, minerals and goodness locked in giving a great taste that your dog will love
slowly roasted: oven roasted in own juices for flavour
delicious and nutritious: free from grain and promotes dental health
